summary: Critical issues: Actions not pinned to SHA (workflow:6, checkout@v4 vs @abc123...). Missing permissions block. ConvertTo-LikePattern (Invoke-PRLabelAssigner.ps1:3-5) oversimplifies glob handling—won't recursively match ** patterns. Missing Set-StrictMode. Test harness brittleness: regex-based YAML validation (run-act-tests.ps1:22-30, should parse YAML), hard-coded expected outputs (81-98 maintenance burden). Rules array mutation in Get-PRLabels could cause reuse issues. Would not ship.
